overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing exploration of the Hufflepuff common room. The player character walks through dormitories, wooden hallways with round doors, and the main common room with a central fireplace, ending with a transition to a dark underground tunnel. Warm wooden interiors with cozy lighting and stained glass details throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hufflepuff dormitory bedroom with four-poster beds

events.description: character approaches and opens the round wooden door to exit the room

agents.ego_description: walking through the dormitory room examining the beds, trophies, and furnishings

entered.detail: wooden four-poster bed with white sheets and red frame
wooden four-poster bed with white sheets
wooden sign with HUFFLEPUFF carved into it mounted on stone wall
silver trophy cup sitting on wooden dresser
large round wooden door with green stained glass floral patterns

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cozy dormitory room with wooden architecture and yellow brick walls. Two four-poster beds flank the space, while a Hufflepuff banner hangs above a round door with stained glass. The character walks toward the door and opens it to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved wooden corridor with round doors and potted plants

events.description: exits the dormitory into a curved hallway with wooden railings overlooking lower levels

agents.ego_description: walking along the curved wooden hallway past student rooms and potted plants

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes sitting on a cushioned bench against the wall

entered.detail: carved wooden balustrade overlooking the lower common room level
series of round wooden doors with green stained glass along the corridor
large terracotta pots with vibrant red flowers
ornate wall-mounted lanterns providing warm yellow light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved wooden corridor outside the dormitory, passing round doors with stained glass and potted plants. A student sits on a bench to the left. The hallway features carved wooden railings overlooking the lower level and warm lantern lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral wooden staircase descending to common room

events.description: begins descending the spiral wooden staircase
reaches the bottom of the stairs and enters the main common room area

agents.ego_description: descending the spiral wooden staircase toward the lower common room level

entered.detail: carved wooden spiral staircase with ornate banister
framed portraits and paintings on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends a beautifully carved wooden spiral staircase. The walls feature framed pictures and stone brickwork. The staircase opens up to reveal the main common room below with a ghostly figure visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Hufflepuff common room with central fireplace and seating areas

events.description: enters the large circular common room from the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room past students sitting by the fireplace and a ghostly figure near the food table

notable_agents.action: translucent ghostly figure standing near the food table
group of students sitting on leather sofas near the fireplace

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and mantle decorations
red leather sofas and armchairs arranged around the room
wooden table stacked with cakes and pastries
large round dark tunnel entrance with steps leading down

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious circular common room with a large fireplace burning in the center. Students sit on leather sofas conversing, while a ghostly figure stands near a food table. The room features patterned rugs, potted plants, and a large round tunnel entrance leading to the kitchens.

events.description: enters the dark tunnel from the well-lit common room, character appearance changes to different outfit

agents.ego_description: entering the dark brick tunnel, character now wearing dark robes with red lining and blonde hair

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead in the tunnel

entered.detail: dark red brick walls with arched ceiling
cooking pots and pans hanging from ceiling hooks

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, narrow brick tunnel with a cobblestone floor. The lighting shifts dramatically to dim and atmospheric. The character's appearance changes to dark robes with a red lining. The tunnel features barrels, hanging pots, and a distant figure walking ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate confines of a student dormitory into the expansive, curved architecture of a residential corridor. It begins inside a cozy room characterized by yellow brick walls and four-poster beds, moving toward a round door adorned with stained glass and a Hufflepuff banner. As the character opens the door and steps outside, the space expands into a warm wooden hallway illuminated by lanterns. The camera then glides along the curved corridor, passing potted plants and a seated student while moving alongside carved wooden railings that overlook the lower level.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, ornate interiors of a magical common room into a dim, atmospheric underground passage. It begins with a descent down a carved wooden spiral staircase, passing framed pictures and stone walls before the view opens up to reveal the expansive living area below. As the camera enters the circular common room, the environment fills with the glow of a central fireplace, leather sofas, and students gathered near a ghostly figure. The scene then shifts as the character moves through a round tunnel entrance, causing the bright, cozy lighting to vanish. Finally, the camera glides into a narrow brick tunnel with cobblestone floors and hanging pots, where the character now wears dark robes with red lining while following a distant figure into the shadows.
